## Checklist

- [ ] Lint, typecheck, build, unit tests, and e2e pass locally
- [ ] Mutations validated on the server; RLS respected
- [ ] Loading, empty, and error states handled where they apply
- [ ] No raw hex or one-off sizes; tokens only
- [ ] No em dashes, no AI attribution anywhere

## UI changes

- [ ] Screenshots attached (before and after)
- [ ] Checked at the desktop and the 390px mobile widths
